id.description: The unique identifier of the incentive result

title.description: The title (name) of the agent associated with this incentive

description.description: The description of the agent associated with this incentive

subtitle.description: The subtitle of the agent associated with this incentive

status.description: The status of the incentive result

startDate.description: The start date of the incentive period

endDate.description: The end date of the incentive period

daysRemaining.description: Server-computed calendar days remaining in the incentive period. Null when endDate is null (open-ended). 0 when the period has expired.

currentCount.description: For percent_of mode: the numerator (qualifying events). For other modes: the count achieved toward the target.

targetCount.description: For percent_of mode: the denominator (total cadence-passing events). For other modes: the target count to achieve.

targetPercent.description: Passing threshold percentage for percent_of/ratio widgets (0–100). Null for all other metric modes.

metricMode.description: Metric tracking mode (e.g. "percent_of", "ratio", "aggregate", "single_event"). Legacy "milestone" mode is now a milestone: true modifier on metricConfig (composes with any mode). For "percent_of", display (currentCount / targetCount * 100)% vs targetPercent%. For "ratio", targetPercent carries the threshold and is not always a percentage.
